# Power Pages release updates and new features

Release plans referenced:
- 2023 release wave 2 plan
- 2023 release wave 1 plan
- 2022 release wave 2 plan

Privacy notice details Azure components:
- Azure Web Apps
- Azure Traffic Manager
- Azure Service Bus
- Azure Key Vault
- Azure Storage
- Microsoft Entra ID

Page last updated: 2025-05-12
